services.name: charx-website
services.notes: WBM backend. First Qiling target because QEMU lab already has the strongest WBM/API fidelity.

services.name: charx-system-config-manager
services.notes: System configuration manager. Useful for config import/export and IPC/API tracing.

services.name: charx-jupicore
services.notes: Central service with ControllerAgent dependency. Runtime failures must be classified, not hidden.

services.name: charx-ocpp16-agent
services.notes: OCPP 1.6 agent. Backend behavior requires real traces or clearly labeled mocks.

services.name: charx-modbus-agent
services.notes: Modbus agent. Empty /data/charx-modbus-agent/devices is expected in lab default state.

services.name: charx-modbus-server
services.notes: Modbus TCP/server side. Register behavior must not be invented without trace or fixture provenance.

services.name: charx-loadmanagement
services.notes: Load management service. Charging point topology remains unknown without runtime/hardware evidence.

services.name: charx-update-agent
services.notes: Update pipeline target. Qiling runs must be dry-run/instrumentation only and must not install bundles.

services.name: charx-controller-agent
services.notes: Experimental only. Depends on CAN, eth1, eth2, TPM/certs, QCA/HomePlug and SECC material.

services.name: charx-system-monitor
services.notes: Experimental system monitor target. Network and modem observations are not hardware truth.
